title: Reinforcement Learning with Metacognitive Feedback Elicits Faithful Uncertainty Expression in LLMs
innovation_summary: Reinforcement Learning with Metacognitive Feedback Elicits Faithful Uncertainty Expression in LLMs: We adopt a two-stage, decoupled approach, first using these methods to calibrate the faithfulness of models' self-reported confidence scores, then mapping to natural, context-adaptable linguistic uncertainty.
